mapper.insert: INSERT INTO channel (seller_id, channel_name, channel_type, api_key, status, created_at) VALUES (#{sellerId}, #{channelName}, #{channelType}, #{apiKey}, #{status}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT channel_id, seller_id, channel_name, channel_type, api_key, status, created_at FROM channel WHERE seller_id = #{sellerId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT channel_id, seller_id, channel_name, channel_type, api_key, status, created_at FROM channel WHERE api_key = #{apiKey} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
